content:
感谢各位守密人的支持！
《忘却前夜》OST：原初宿命之战 已发布，欢迎收听、下载及分享。
如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！（二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用）

**忘却前夜OST：原初宿命之战**
荒诞与混沌的梦境伊始之初，祂就注定会面对祂的宿命。
但祂已经历了太多，也定义了太多。
祂已决意以人类能够保持的最大理智，注视自己的起源，那至高的神祇。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
规划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST: "War of Primordial Destiny" was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

**Morimens OST: War of Primordial Destiny**
From the very beginning of the absurd and chaotic dream, They were destined to confront Their fate.
Yet They have experienced too much, and defined too much.
They have resolved, with the maximum sanity a human can retain, to gaze upon Their own origin: The Supreme Will.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：原初宿命之战

content:
感谢各位守密人的支持！
《忘却前夜》OST：创世痴愚之主 已发布，欢迎收听、下载及分享。
如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！（二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用）

**忘却前夜OST：创世痴愚之主**
脱离主，直面主，忤逆主。
你的故事无人知晓，你的记忆与世长存。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
规划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST: "The Blind Idiot Lord" was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

**Morimens OST: The Blind Idiot Lord**
To break from the Lord, to stand before the Lord, to defy the Lord.
Your story is known to none, yet your memory shall forever endure with the world.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：创世痴愚之主
